name: UniqueGiftModel
description: This object describes the model of a unique gift.

fields.name: sticker
fields.description: The sticker that represents the unique gift

fields.name: rarity_per_mille
fields.description: The number of unique gifts that receive this model for every 1000 gift upgrades. Always 0 for crafted gifts.

fields.name: rarity
fields.description: Rarity of the model if it is a crafted model. Currently, can be “uncommon”, “rare”, “epic”, or “legendary”.
